users.name: Abed Nadir
users.condition: autism spectrum (canonically coded, not explicitly diagnosed on the show); occasional selective mutism during sensory overload
users.access_method: mostly verbal; text or phone typing when overloaded

users.name: Allie Hamilton Calhoun
users.access_method: verbal when lucid, simple yes/no during confusion, pen or typing only rarely and with help

users.name: Christopher Reeve
users.condition: C1-C2 complete spinal cord injury (quadriplegia), ventilator-dependent
users.access_method: dictation to assistants; sip-and-puff joystick on wheelchair; eventual voice-activated computer

users.name: Christy Brown
users.access_method: left foot for typing, writing, painting — the only reliably controlled limb
users.tone_summary: fierce, self-deprecating, sardonic, lyrical at moments

users.name: Forrest Gump
users.access_method: verbal primarily; simple typing or assistance when needed for forms and official paperwork

users.name: Gabrielle 'Gabby' Giffords
users.condition: aphasia and right-side hemiparesis following traumatic brain injury (gunshot wound, 2011)

users.name: Jason Becker
users.condition: amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) — long-term survivor, 35+ years post-diagnosis
users.access_method: eye-gaze tracking, with his father's letter-code board as backup

users.name: Jean-Dominique Bauby
users.access_method: alphabet-blink with amanuensis (Claude Mendibil, four hours most afternoons)

users.name: Michael J. Fox
users.access_method: voice when available; phone and laptop typing with adaptive keyboard; occasional dictation

users.name: Raymond Babbitt
users.condition: autism with savant syndrome (memory and mathematical savantism)
users.access_method: verbal when calm plus visual schedule displays

users.name: Stephen Hawking
users.condition: amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS / motor neurone disease)
users.access_method: cheek muscle twitch detected by infrared sensor on glasses, driving predictive word software (ACAT)

users.name: Tito Rajarshi Mukhopadhyay
users.condition: non-verbal autism spectrum disorder with apraxia

users.name: Walter "Flynn" White Jr.
users.tone_summary: teen-casual, impatient, breakfast-enthusiast, honest, dry under pressure

users.name: Wendy Mitchell
users.access_method: typing on laptop or phone, often with help from her 'brain-book' — a physical notebook of reminders and cues
